title: A2Z 4 Kids Boy's Socks-970 Socks
description: TIMELESS STYLE FOR EVERY KID: Introducing our girls boys plain Trainer ankle socks, the perfect blend of comfort and classic style. These socks are designed to keep your little ones cosy while complementing any outfit's simplicity and versatility. SUPERIOR COMFORT & DURABILITY Manufactured with a blend of 70% Cotton, 28% Polyester and 2% Elastane which gives it the best attributes such as being: soft, breathable, shrink resistant, durable and very easy to wash. These school socks are ideal for kids running around the playground or for PE and they will not keep riding down. A FIT FOR EVERY GROWTH SPURT: Available in four age-appropriate sizes: 2-3 years, 3-6 years, 6-9 years, and 10-14 Years. Our range of timeless colors, including white, Black, Navy, Charcoal, Grey, Black/White/Charcoal/Grey and Week Days, combines simplicity with sophistication. These socks are tailored to ensure a snug and comfortable fit as your child grows. Say goodbye to constantly replacing too-small socks COMFORT AND STABILITY: Trainer socks are designed to provide additional stability during movement, whether you are working out, They fit comfortably and prevent any unwanted slips, allowing you to focus confidently on your movements. Thanks to these socks, you no longer need to worry about slipping while exercising, and you can enjoy a safe and comfortable experience. BUNDLE OF JOY: Why limit yourself to only one pair of socks when you can have six? Our pack of Six plain socks is a real treat for your feet. These versatile and practical socks guarantee that you always have a fresh pair to match any outfit. Take your sock game to the next level with this value-packed set, combining style, comfort, and convenience in one package.
